name: slideless
description: Generate, push, pull, share, and collaborate on HTML presentations. Decks are either a single self-contained HTML file or a folder with sibling assets; Slideless serves them like a static website. In v0.5: push/pull from any device, invite dev collaborators by email, decouple publishing from sharing. Skills delegate to the official `slideless` CLI (≥ 0.5.0). Run `setup-slideless` first.
